Job Title: Founder - Recruiting for Start-ups across NYC - Applied AI & Software Engineering
Text: In a world where everyone promises a lot and a less then that is true in reality, Adam listens first. Then, he best matches the expectations, from both the person seeking a job and the one offering one. Adam has really good social skills and lots of people know him and like him. He alone recruited almost everyone in the company I work for, as we grew from 10 to 120+ people. That is a performance, that only a handful of recruiters can make possible.

Between 2002 and 2006 Ciprian and I were classmates at the National College of Informatics "Spiru Haret", in Suceava. Ciprian purely loves Informatics, especially Web Development. He had learned so much, that every and each one of my colleagues think of him as mentor, as a guru among us.  We wish to have done the same.   His work recommends himself, through quality and amount, always in time. Employing Ciprian, is like racing a Dodge Viper against Mini's. No matter what, you will get the finish line first.

Teo and I were classmates for 4 years. He proved himself worthy in a highly competitive environment. One of the qualities I admire at Teodor are his team spirit and his endurance under stress. Not only he is competent and motivated, he has humor too. For an employer that makes the difference between having the man for the problem and liking the man for the problem.   Teodor is a proactive and tireless contributor who would make a great addition to any team, including the football team.
Oana Alexandra is a very smart and skilled person with a positive attitude. She has the ability to communicate easily, she is definitely the kind of person that can turn a bad day into a good one.
